title: COBB7ED RPG
description: Modpack focusing on immersion in the realms of Cobblemon and RPG/Adventure
body:
Modpack for a small community/friend group. VERY WIP - Updating it as I flesh out server requirements and other misc things.

Main focus is immersion, quality of life, vanilla+, and a little bit of verticle content expansion to give it a little bit of longevity.

Quite a few mods are in to help balance out the power curve of the game, to keep it a bit more in check.

Cobblemon is a core part of the experience. BUT NOT IN THE 1.0.0 RELEASE BECAUSE I GOT BURNT OUT TRYING TO KEEP UP WITH IT AND WANTED TO TRY AN ITTERATION WITHOUT IT LOL
